# stripe_entitlements_feature (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an existing Stripe Entitlements feature.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stripe_entitlements_feature" "api_access" {
  lookup_key = "api_access"
  name       = "API access"
}

data "stripe_entitlements_feature" "api_access" {
  lookup_key = stripe_entitlements_feature.api_access.lookup_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the feature.
- `lookup_key` (String) The lookup key for the feature.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the feature is active.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Set of key-value pairs attached to the feature.
- `name` (String) The feature's internal name.
